title: AP Inter 1st, 2nd Year Result 2026 To Be Out At 10:31 AM, Here's How To Check Your Scores Via NDTV
description: AP Manabadi Inter Results 2026: AP Inter 1st and 2nd year results out today are available for download via NDTV board exam page. Check direct link or scan the QR code to instantly check scores while avoiding heavy traffic on official websites.
